keyPoints: Provides a dedicated API Security & Routing platform engineered to a centralized control plane for securing, routing, and monitoring input-output traffic across multiple deployed agents..
Integrates Agent Gateway capabilities directly into multi-tier cloud architectures, serving as a key component of the Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning Ecosystem portfolio.
Encourages standard interface structures (REST APIs, Client SDKs, or console controls) to facilitate rapid cloud resource provisioning.
Provides APIs and SDKs to integrate cognitive capabilities into business workflows with minimal custom machine learning development.
Supports foundation model deployment, tuning, and prompt engineering within unified workspaces.
Uses pre-trained endpoints or custom pipelines for computer vision, translation, speech-to-text, and conversational interfaces.
Optimizes Agent Gateway performance through automated platform scaling and resource balancing.
Enables resource segregation, logical naming conventions, and tag-based configuration policies for Agent Gateway.
Integrates with VPC routing and private service access architectures to secure communication tunnels.
Governs access to Agent Gateway using standard IAM roles (e.g. roles/agentgateway.admin and roles/agentgateway.viewer) for fine-grained permissions.
Supports audit logging to record administrative actions and verify API configuration modifications for compliance reports.
Secures operational payloads using encryption at rest (Google-managed or Customer-Managed Keys via KMS) and SSL/TLS in transit.
Offers regional and multi-regional configuration options, duplicating service state across multiple zones to sustain outage events.
Enforces API quotas and rate limits programmatically to prevent resource starvation and noisy-neighbor interference.
Provides service recovery tools, regular status logs, and high-availability SLAs matching enterprise uptime goals.
Billed based on resource metrics (e.g., operations count, active connections, or gigabytes stored) allowing cost optimization.
Integrates with Cloud Monitoring and Cloud Logging to enable real-time alerting, metrics tracking, and diagnostic dashboards.
Enables command line administration through the gcloud CLI tool, allowing pipeline automation and scripting.

scenarios.scenario: An enterprise wants to construct a secure architectural pattern involving Agent Gateway that blocks public internet ingress and enforces strict access restrictions.
scenarios.solution: Deploy the Agent Gateway resource inside a VPC Service Control perimeter, routing connections privately using Serverless VPC connectors or internal gateways, and assign permissions using IAM roles.

scenarios.scenario: A development team needs to build automated CI/CD configurations that configure and audit Agent Gateway operations on a regular basis while tracking costs.
scenarios.solution: Use Cloud Build scripts executing 'gcloud' commands to provision the Agent Gateway resources, enable Cloud Audit Logs, and configure budget notifications at the project folder level.

commands.description: Create or configure a new Agent Gateway resource
commands.command:
gcloud agentgateway create prod-agentgateway-resource \
  --region=us-central1 \
  --description="Production Agent Gateway Resource"

commands.description: List active Agent Gateway instances and query configuration states
